item.title: 5 Dealership Mistakes to Avoid
item.description: Common dealership mistakes are broken down to help car buyers avoid costly misunderstandings during the buying process. Which mistake catches most people off guard?

media:content.media:title: 5 Dealership Mistakes to Avoid
media:content.media:description: Common dealership mistakes are broken down to help car buyers avoid costly misunderstandings during the buying process. Which mistake catches most people off guard?

item.title: Why Windshield Repairs Are Expensive
item.description: An explanation of why windshield repair or replacement can cost more than expected, including materials, sensors, and labor. What drives up the price?

media:content.media:title: Why Windshield Repairs Are Expensive
media:content.media:description: An explanation of why windshield repair or replacement can cost more than expected, including materials, sensors, and labor. What drives up the price?

item.title: Asking the Right Van Questions
item.description: A discussion around important van features and what buyers should consider before making a decision. Which features actually matter most?

media:content.media:title: Asking the Right Van Questions
media:content.media:description: A discussion around important van features and what buyers should consider before making a decision. Which features actually matter most?

item.title: Car Buying Tips for the Finance Office
item.description: Chevy Dude shares practical tips to help car buyers save money in the finance office.

media:content.media:title: Car Buying Tips for the Finance Office
media:content.media:description: Chevy Dude shares practical tips to help car buyers save money in the finance office.

item.title: Working Within Your Budget
item.description: A look at how buyers can better understand and adjust their budget when shopping for a vehicle, especially when numbers don’t match expectations. How do you make the most of what you can spend?

media:content.media:title: Working Within Your Budget
media:content.media:description: A look at how buyers can better understand and adjust their budget when shopping for a vehicle, especially when numbers don’t match expectations. How do you make the most of what you can spend?

item.title: Why Cheap Cars Are Hard to Find
item.description: A breakdown of why budget-friendly cars are becoming harder to locate in today’s market, including supply, demand, and pricing trends. What’s driving affordability issues?

media:content.media:title: Why Cheap Cars Are Hard to Find
media:content.media:description: A breakdown of why budget-friendly cars are becoming harder to locate in today’s market, including supply, demand, and pricing trends. What’s driving affordability issues?

item.title: Cap or Fact?
item.description: Common car-buying claims and dealership myths are put to the test to separate fact from fiction. Which myth surprises you the most?

media:content.media:title: Cap or Fact?
media:content.media:description: Common car-buying claims and dealership myths are put to the test to separate fact from fiction. Which myth surprises you the most?

item.title: A Heartfelt Moment
item.description: A personal and meaningful moment highlights emotion, gratitude, and connection beyond everyday routines. What made this moment so memorable?
